mapper.insert: INSERT INTO training_course_orders (user_id, course_id, course_name, price, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{price}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.user_id AS userId, o.course_id AS courseId, o.course_name AS courseName, o.price, o.status, o.created_at AS createdAt, u.nickname AS buyerName, u.email AS buyerEmail FROM training_course_orders o INNER JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, course_id AS courseId, course_name AS courseName, price, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM training_course_orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, course_id AS courseId, course_name AS courseName, price, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM training_course_orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} LIMIT 1
